channel.title: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20's Adventuring Party on Dropout.tv

item.title: Spinch Party Kill
item.description:
The cast reflect on their time in the Gladlands and have a really big snack.

Duration: 26:18

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Gladlands, ally beardsley, kimia behpoornia, vic michaelis, oscar montoya, zac oyama, jacob wysocki, brennan lee mulligan
